<?php /** * This file is part of cocur/slugify. * * (c) Florian Eckerstorfer <florian@eckerstorfer.co> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Cocur\Slugify\RuleProvider; /** * RuleProviderInterface * * @package Cocur\Slugify\RuleProvider * @author Florian Eckerstorfer * @copyright 2015 Florian Eckerstorfer */ interface RuleProviderInterface { /** * @param $ruleset * * @return array */ public function getRules(string $ruleset): array; }
